title: In-game Custom Stuff
description: Add customized stuffs with in-game editing!
body:
**You can add items, blocks, textures etc. on GUI.**

Use Registry Book at the last of misc creative tab!

![Registry Menu](https://i.imgur.com/oOxlwUD.png)
![Adding a block model](https://i.imgur.com/5UL2Rko.png)
![Adding a cage block model](https://i.imgur.com/i4syMrn.png)
![Block List](https://i.imgur.com/DEnZk4N.png)
![Place blocks to your world!](https://i.imgur.com/i9qOQx0.png)

# Notes:
- This is a both(client and server)-side mod.
- Feel free to use this mod in any modpacks.



# Mod compatibilities:
Preparing now...



# Mod Incompatibilities:
- VintageFix
